candidate.headLine: Senior Director, People & Culture at Singtel
candidate.summary:
I am a seasoned HR practitioner with more than 25 years of HR experience in progressive roles across the full spectrum of the HR function. A strategic HR professional who seek to understand business needs and add value by developing and executing effective people plans, HR programs and initiatives to meet the strategic objectives of the company. 

I have extended my HR exposure regionally with more than 10 years’ experience in the Asia Pacific region. In the current role, I lead HR teams in the Asia Pacific region consisting of a total headcount of about 2,500 to support the business in a highly matrix high tech organization. I interface with business leaders from different geographical locations, providing full oversight of HR programs from talent management, development, talent acquisition & retention and performance management of high and low performers.

candidate.headLine: Digital Solutions Manager at Singtel
candidate.summary:
Currently based in Frankfurt, I work as a Digital Solutions Manager, supporting enterprise customers across Europe and the US. Over the past 4+ years in the telecommunications industry, I’ve focused on helping businesses make the most of data, digitalization, and automation within their network.

I enjoy using technology to enable and empower our customers to simplify processes, unlock efficiency, and create more value.
